PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?governor ?governorLabel WHERE {
  ?governor p:P39 ?position .
  ?position ps:P39 wd:Q47489022 .
  ?position pq:P580 ?start .
  ?governor rdfs:label ?governorLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?governorLabel) = "en")
}
ORDER BY ?start
LIMIT 1

args.sparql: SELECT ?governor ?governorLabel WHERE { ?governor p:P39 ?position . ?position ps:P39 wd:Q47489022 . ?position pq:P580 ?start . ?governor rdfs:label ?governorLabel . FILTER(LANG(?governorLabel) = "en") } ORDER BY ?start LIMIT 1
